state.next-action: Task `11-05` is now closed: `/customer/dashboard` and `/ops/dashboard` are canonical with compatibility redirects, public customer sign-up is narrowed to claim or invite flows while Clerk is primary, the ops dashboard persists a first-party one-time welcome dismissal, Clerk customer sessions now backfill the matching first-party account by account email when needed, outbound portal CTAs no longer treat Supabase-only users as fully migrated when Clerk is primary, and Stripe customer reuse now backfills from first-party invoices or service plans before creating a new Stripe customer. The active loop moves to `12-02`: build `/ops/users` and `/ops/customers`, starting with the app-owned staff or user management table shape, invite controls, role-template filters, and first-party customer listing contracts. If feature flags expand beyond env toggles, keep them behind an app-owned adapter so Vercel Flags can be swapped later without scattering provider calls through the UI.
